autopsy.title: AI Autopsy Report
autopsy.subtitle: Analyzing this trade
autopsy.scanning: Reviewing market data and trading patterns...

commentary.IMPULSE_WIN: You profited in under 5 minutes, but this isn't a repeatable strategy. Separate luck from systematic edge in your analysis.
commentary.PERFECT_PATIENCE: You carried the plan all the way. Over 5% return is concrete proof of patience discipline. Highlight this trade in your weekly review.
commentary.EARLY_EXIT_WIN: You were profitable but exited before the target out of fear. The system works — stick to your TP next time.
commentary.PLAN_FOLLOWED: Entry, hold, and exit were consistent. You validated the system. Make this behavior sustainable.
commentary.IMPULSE_LOSS: Trade lasted under 5 minutes and closed in a loss. Classic FOMO entry. Run at least 3 rule checks before your next trade.
commentary.STREAK_BREAKER: This loss dealt serious damage to your account. Urgently review position sizing and risk management. No more trades today.
commentary.FOMO_ENTRY: Entry timing wasn't optimal and resulted in a small loss. Wait more carefully for a proper setup next time.
commentary.STOP_HIT: The plan was in place and the stop was hit — this isn't a bad trade, it's proper risk management. Trust the system and continue.

aiComments.fomoEntry: You lost quickly — likely an unplanned, emotional entry. Before the next trade, ask yourself: does this match the setup criteria?
aiComments.perfectPatience: You executed perfectly to your swing strategy and held the position to full target. These are the trades that grow accounts.
aiComments.offPlanScalp: You chose a scalp strategy yet held this trade for over 3 days. Sticking to your plan is non-negotiable in the long run.
aiComments.stopHit: Your stop was hit. Risk management worked — this is actually correct behavior. The market took you out, not the system.
aiComments.impulseWin: You won but it happened too fast — luck or skill? Note this setup if you see it again.
aiComments.earlyExit: The trade was profitable but you exited too early and missed the bigger move. Trust your take-profit, not your hands.
aiComments.planFollowed: Both entry and exit matched your plan. You're maintaining trading discipline — well done.
